topics: Classifications of Data Structures- ADT and CDT
Static and Dynamic. Algorithm/Program Development: Analysis of Algorithms-Space Complexity
Understanding the notion of Time Complexity using graphical and tabular representation for Linear
Logarithmic and Exponential functions. Asymptotic Notations- Best Case
Properties of Array. Representation of Single/Two-dimensional Arrays
and manipulation using Arrays (Addition only). Stack: Operations on Stack using Array Queues: Definition
Priority Queue (Concept only) Applications of Stack: Infix to Postfix conversion and Postfix evaluation
Linear Search and Binary search. Sorting: Bubble Sort

Insertion Sort. Quicksort and Merge Sort (Recursive Algorithms only) Complexity analysis of sorting algorithms (Detailed analysis is not required) and Heap sort. Hash Tables: Different Hash Functions: Division method
Collision Resolution Techniques: Closed Hashing (Linear Probing) -Drawbacks
Double Hashing. Load Factor and Re-hashing
Dynamic memory management. Representation of a Linked List
Operations on Singly Linked List- Traversal
Deletion and Searching. Applications of Linked List: Polynomial representation and manipulation (Addition only). Operations on Doubly Linked List- Traversal
Circular Linked List (Concept only) Linked List representation of Stack and Queue
Stack implementation and Operations on Stack using Linked List
Queue implementation and Operations on Queue using Linked list
Level. Binary Trees: Properties of Binary Trees
Linear and Linked List representations of Binary Trees
Binary Tree Applications: Expression Tree creation. Binary Search Tree: Creation
and Search operations. Heap: Creation Graph: Definition
Adjacency Matrix and Adjacency List representation
Graph Applications: Shortest Path Problem-Dijkstra’s Algorithm
